subject: Mathematics
overall_learning_objectives: Recall the definition of integers and their position on a number line
Add and subtract integers with the same sign
Understand the concept of absolute value
Identify the additive inverse of any given integer
Use the number line to visualize basic operations

lesson_plan.title: Integers and the Number Line
topics_covered: Review of positive and negative numbers
Representing integers on a horizontal and vertical number line
teaching_strategy: Visual demonstration using a large floor number line
student_activities: Mark -5, 0, and 3 on a provided number line
Step forward for positive and backward for negative numbers
assessment: Oral quiz on 'Which is greater: -2 or -5?'

lesson_plan.title: Addition of Integers (Same Sign)
topics_covered: Rule: Add absolute values and keep the common sign
student_activities: Create a 'Bank Ledger' with simple deposits and withdrawals
assessment: Notebook check for correct sign usage

teaching_aids: Colored counters (Red for negative, Blue for positive)
evaluation_methods: Peer grading of number line drawings
teacher_tip: Always remind students that -10 is smaller than -2, even though 10 is bigger than 2. Use the 'debt' analogy: owing 10 rupees is worse than owing 2.
